SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class NotificationDTO

java.lang.Object
common.dto.NotificationDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NotificationDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable data transfer object representing a notification row — a simulated/popup message addressed to exactly one recipient (a visitor or a staff user).

Built server-side by NotificationDAO and shipped to the client in two ways:

  • as the payload of a realtime ServerEvent (entity "notification") when a notification is sent to an online recipient — drives the instant simulation popup; and
  • inside a ServerResponse list when the notification center fetches a recipient's history (the offline-fetch path).

Exactly one of getRecipientVisitorId() / getRecipientUserId() is non-null. getSimulatedTarget() carries the recipient's contact (email or phone) so the simulation popup can render "Simulation — would send via <channel> to <target>: <body>" without a second lookup on the client. Because the user table has no email/phone column, a staff recipient's target falls back to their username.

getAcknowledgedAt() backs the notification center's unread highlight: a notification is unread while it is null. It maps to the notification.acknowledged_at column added for this feature (see setup.sql); sent_at could not double as the seen-marker because it is stamped at delivery time, before the recipient has seen it.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationDTO

      public NotificationDTO(int id, Long recipientVisitorId, Integer recipientUserId, String channel, String body, String simulatedTarget, String createdAt, String sentAt, String acknowledgedAt)
      Creates a fully populated notification.
      Parameters:
      id - unique notification identifier
      recipientVisitorId - recipient visitor's national id, or null for a staff recipient
      recipientUserId - recipient staff user's id, or null for a visitor recipient
      channel - delivery channel (SIM_EMAIL/SIM_SMS/POPUP)
      body - message body
      simulatedTarget - recipient contact for the simulation popup (email/phone, or username)
      createdAt - creation timestamp (string form)
      sentAt - delivery timestamp (string form), or null
      acknowledgedAt - acknowledgement timestamp (string form), or null while unread

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      the unique notification identifier

    • getRecipientVisitorId

      public Long getRecipientVisitorId()
      Returns:
      the recipient visitor's national id, or null for a staff recipient

    • getRecipientUserId

      public Integer getRecipientUserId()
      Returns:
      the recipient staff user's id, or null for a visitor recipient

    • getChannel

      public String getChannel()
      Returns:
      the delivery channel (SIM_EMAIL/SIM_SMS/POPUP)

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns:
      the message body

    • getSimulatedTarget

      public String getSimulatedTarget()
      Returns:
      the recipient contact the message would be sent to (email/phone, or a staff username)

    • getCreatedAt

      public String getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      the creation timestamp (string form)

    • getSentAt

      public String getSentAt()
      Returns:
      the delivery timestamp (string form), or null if not yet delivered

    • getAcknowledgedAt

      public String getAcknowledgedAt()
      Returns:
      the acknowledgement timestamp (string form), or null while unread

    • isAcknowledged

      public boolean isAcknowledged()
      Returns:
      true if this notification has been acknowledged (read) by the recipient
